title: Vietnamese Prosciutto Pilaf
description: A flavorful and savory pilaf dish infused with the taste of Vietnam, featuring crispy prosciutto and fluffy rice.
instructions: Heat the midnight oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced prosciutto and cook until crispy, about 4 minutes.
Remove the prosciutto from the skillet and set aside.
Add the fluffy rice to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the vietnamese craving spice blend to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the cooked prosciutto.
